Transaction: Proposed acquisition of 60% of IslaGrid via primary share subscription in BRI and secondary share purchase from existing IslaGrid shareholders; non-binding except for Exclusivity, Confidentiality, and Governing Law.

Consideration: Php 2.80 billion total; BRI to issue 320,000,000 primary shares to Luntian at Php 7.50 per share (pre-money valuation Php 10.5 billion), balance to fund secondary purchase at closing; price subject to customary adjustments.

Funding: Mix of equity (this subscription) and senior secured term loan from Bangko ng Silangan, Inc. (fictional) up to Php 1.20 billion; no financing outs; escrow to hold Php 250 million for 12 months for indemnity.
Use of Proceeds: Expansion of IslaGrid substation upgrades and working capital; no proceeds to be used for share buybacks or dividends for 12 months post-closing.

MNPI and Blackout: All terms herein are material non-public information; BRI insiders are under a blackout from the date hereof until two (2) full trading days after public posting of the 17-C; no trading by directors, officers, or employees in breach of BRI’s Insider Trading Policy or the SRC.

Exclusivity/No-Shop: 60 days from signing; BRI shall not solicit or entertain alternative proposals; break fee of Php 70 million payable by BRI upon willful breach of no-shop, and reimbursement cap of Php 20 million for Luntian due diligence costs.

Long-Stop Date and Closing: Target signing by 28 June 2026; long-stop date 31 October 2026; closing to occur within five (5) business days after receipt of SEC and PSE approvals and satisfaction of CPs; governing law: Republic of the Philippines; venue: Makati City.

Strictly Confidential – Draft Term Sheet (Philippines SRC) dated 03 June 2026; not for selective disclosure and not yet posted on PSE EDGE or in any SEC Form 17-C.
Issuer: Bayani Renewables, Inc. (PSE-listed, symbol: BRI); Counterparty: Luntian Capital Partners SPC; Target: IslaGrid Energy Networks Corp. (private).
Transaction: Proposed acquisition of 60% of IslaGrid via primary share subscription in BRI and secondary share purchase from existing IslaGrid shareholders; non-binding except for Exclusivity, Confidentiality, and Governing Law.
Consideration: Php 2.80 billion total; BRI to issue 320,000,000 primary shares to Luntian at Php 7.50 per share (pre-money valuation Php 10.5 billion), balance to fund secondary purchase at closing; price subject to customary adjustments.
Funding: Mix of equity (this subscription) and senior secured term loan from Bangko ng Silangan, Inc. (fictional) up to Php 1.20 billion; no financing outs; escrow to hold Php 250 million for 12 months for indemnity.
Use of Proceeds: Expansion of IslaGrid substation upgrades and working capital; no proceeds to be used for share buybacks or dividends for 12 months post-closing.
Conditions Precedent: SEC approval of BRI’s increase in Authorized Capital Stock and confirmation of valuation; PSE approval for listing of additional shares; Board and stockholders’ approvals of BRI and IslaGrid; third-party consents; no Material Adverse Effect as defined under Philippine law.
Disclosure and Timing: Upon Board approval, Issuer will request a trading halt and file SEC Form 17-C and PSE EDGE Material Information Disclosure within the applicable PSE timetable; no external communication before such filings without PSE clearance; compliance with SRC Rule 17.1 and PSE Revised Disclosure Rules.
MNPI and Blackout: All terms herein are material non-public information; BRI insiders are under a blackout from the date hereof until two (2) full trading days after public posting of the 17-C; no trading by directors, officers, or employees in breach of BRI’s Insider Trading Policy or the SRC.
Exclusivity/No-Shop: 60 days from signing; BRI shall not solicit or entertain alternative proposals; break fee of Php 70 million payable by BRI upon willful breach of no-shop, and reimbursement cap of Php 20 million for Luntian due diligence costs.
Escrow and Accounts: Escrow Agent: Silid Trust Company (fictional); Escrow Account No. 001-765432-99 at Bangko ng Silangan, Inc.; signatories to be designated prior to signing.
Public/Already Announced Reference: As previously disclosed by BRI in SEC Form 17-C dated 05 May 2026 (posted on PSE EDGE) regarding the commencement of a strategic portfolio review, that disclosure remains public and does not include the specific pricing and counterparty set forth in this term sheet.
Benign/Non-Transaction Items: The press release on 12 January 2026 about BRI’s coastal reforestation program is general CSR information and is not material to a reasonable investor; operational update of Tala Foods OPC (an affiliate not party to this deal) is outside the scope of this Transaction.
HR/Tax: Retention arrangements for key IslaGrid engineers (aggregate cap Php 18 million) will be implemented post-closing and are subject to BIR withholding and payroll processes; these HR matters are not required to be disclosed on PSE EDGE unless otherwise material in aggregate.
Long-Stop Date and Closing: Target signing by 28 June 2026; long-stop date 31 October 2026; closing to occur within five (5) business days after receipt of SEC and PSE approvals and satisfaction of CPs; governing law: Republic of the Philippines; venue: Makati City.
